'''âd-ng-dh-j''' ('''kadangdhejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flawless|flawless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-dh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flawless|flawless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-ng-dh-j
|-
! Lemma
| kadangdhejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidangdhejoko|thidangdhejoko]] || [[word:jidangdhejoko|jidangdhejoko]] || [[word:shidangdhejoko|shidangdhejoko]] || [[word:kidangdhejoko|kidangdhejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudangdhejoko|thuthudangdhejoko]] || [[word:jujudangdhejoko|jujudangdhejoko]] || [[word:shushudangdhejoko|shushudangdhejoko]] || [[word:kukudangdhejoko|kukudangdhejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodangdhejoko|thodangdhejoko]] || [[word:jodangdhejoko|jodangdhejoko]] || [[word:shodangdhejoko|shodangdhejoko]] || [[word:kodangdhejoko|kodangdhejoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdangdhejoko|thĂŠdangdhejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdangdhejoko|jĂŠdangdhejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdangdhejoko|shĂŠdangdhejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdangdhejoko|kĂŠdangdhejoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
